info.title: Sensitive Stock Backend API
info.description: Global OpenAPI contract for the Sensitive Stock Flask backend. All protected business operations use the shared bearerAuth scheme.

post.summary: Issue a bearer token for valid administrator credentials.

get.summary: List backend research capabilities and runtime status.
Return market source metadata and available market routes.
Return latest quotes for one or more A-share symbols.
Return hot concept or industry sectors.
Return latest Jin10 market news items.
Return derived market intelligence from Jin10 news and market data.
Return multi-source market news predictions and backtest handoff.
Return recent stored market prediction runs.
Return one stored market prediction run.
Evaluate one stored market prediction run against latest quotes.
Return preset strategy metadata for quantitative backtests.
Return screener templates and capability metadata.

post.summary: Execute a structured or natural-language screening request.
Generate a structured stock diagnosis report.
Run factor analysis for a symbol and date range.
Optimize a portfolio for the requested objective.

tags.name: market
tags.description: AkShare market data and Jin10 intelligence APIs.
